---
id: authorization-resources-controller-list-organization-memberships-for-resource
title: "List organization memberships for resource"
description: "Returns all organization memberships that have a specific permission on a resource instance. This is useful for answering 'Who can access this resource?'."
sidebar_label: "List organization memberships for resource"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List organization memberships for resource"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/authorization/resources/{resource_id}/organization_memberships"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all organization memberships that have a specific permission on a resource instance. This is useful for answering "Who can access this resource?".

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
